creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Indeed, it is not just the ability to run virtual VMs. I guess I am not the only one who uses it for running networking labs which consist of dozens of VMs with different NIC modes. I would miss it dearly. Actually, I would need to give up FreeBSD at some important parts of my workflow and replace it with something else that offers Virtualbox.

Let me know if I can help somehow.
